'''√th-t-g''' ('''thataga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:darraigne|darraigne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:darraigne|darraigne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| thataga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thatagithi|thatagithi]] || [[word:thatagiji|thatagiji]] || [[word:thatagishi|thatagishi]] || [[word:thatagi|thatagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thataguthuth|thataguthuth]] || [[word:thatagujuj|thatagujuj]] || [[word:thatagushush|thatagushush]] || [[word:thatag|thatag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thataguthu|thataguthu]] || [[word:thataguju|thataguju]] || [[word:thatagushu|thatagushu]] || [[word:thatagu|thatagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatagufuth|thatagufuth]] || [[word:thatagufuj|thatagufuj]] || [[word:thatagufush|thatagufush]] || [[word:thataguf|thataguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thatagethe|thatagethe]] || [[word:thatageje|thatageje]] || [[word:thatageshe|thatageshe]] || [[word:thatage|thatage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatagothoth|thatagothoth]] || [[word:thatagojoj|thatagojoj]] || [[word:thatagoshosh|thatagoshosh]] || [[word:thatag|thatag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatagotho|thatagotho]] || [[word:thatagojo|thatagojo]] || [[word:thatagosho|thatagosho]] || [[word:thatago|thatago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatagofoth|thatagofoth]] || [[word:thatagofoj|thatagofoj]] || [[word:thatagofosh|thatagofosh]] || [[word:thatagof|thatagof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatagïfïf|thatagïfïf]] || [[word:thatagïfïf|thatagïfïf]] || [[word:thatagïfïf|thatagïfïf]] || [[word:thatagïfïf|thatagïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]] || [[word:thatagïf|thatagïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thatagæthæ|thatagæthæ]] || [[word:thatagæjæ|thatagæjæ]] || [[word:thatagæshæ|thatagæshæ]] || [[word:thatagæ|thatagæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatagathath|thatagathath]] || [[word:thatagajaj|thatagajaj]] || [[word:thatagashash|thatagashash]] || [[word:thatag|thatag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatagatha|thatagatha]] || [[word:thatagaja|thatagaja]] || [[word:thatagasha|thatagasha]] || [[word:thataga|thataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatagafath|thatagafath]] || [[word:thatagafaj|thatagafaj]] || [[word:thatagafash|thatagafash]] || [[word:thatagaf|thatagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thatagasha|thatagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothatagasha|gothatagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithatagasha|gokithatagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thatagnüsha|thatagnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothatagnknüsha|gothatagnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithatagnüsha|gokithatagnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thatagshësha|thatagshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothatagnkshësha|gothatagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithatagshësha|gokithatagshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thatagrosha|thatagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothatagnkrosha|gothatagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithatagrosha|gokithatagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thatagmusha|thatagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatagnkmusha|gothatagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatagmusha|gokithatagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thatagsherasha|thatagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothatagnksherasha|gothatagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithatagsherasha|gokithatagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thatagngasha|thatagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothatagnkngasha|gothatagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithatagngasha|gokithatagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thatagyasha|thatagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothatagnkyasha|gothatagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithatagyasha|gokithatagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thatagyamasha|thatagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothatagnkyamasha|gothatagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithatagyamasha|gokithatagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thatagnüshësha|thatagnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothatagnknüshësha|gothatagnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithatagnüshësha|gokithatagnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thatagnürosha|thatagnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothatagnknürosha|gothatagnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithatagnürosha|gokithatagnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatagnümusha|thatagnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatagnknümusha|gothatagnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatagnümusha|gokithatagnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thatagshënüsha|thatagshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothatagnkshënüsha|gothatagnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithatagshënüsha|gokithatagshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thatagshërosha|thatagshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothatagnkshërosha|gothatagnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithatagshërosha|gokithatagshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatagshëmusha|thatagshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatagnkshëmusha|gothatagnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatagshëmusha|gokithatagshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thatagronüsha|thatagronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothatagnkronüsha|gothatagnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithatagronüsha|gokithatagronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thatagroshësha|thatagroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothatagnkroshësha|gothatagnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithatagroshësha|gokithatagroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatagromusha|thatagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatagnkromusha|gothatagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatagromusha|gokithatagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thatagmunüsha|thatagmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothatagnkmunüsha|gothatagnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithatagmunüsha|gokithatagmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thatagmushësha|thatagmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothatagnkmushësha|gothatagnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithatagmushësha|gokithatagmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thatagmurosha|thatagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothatagnkmurosha|gothatagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithatagmurosha|gokithatagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thatag|thatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:thætæg|thætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothatag|hothatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hothætæg|hothætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothatag|hohothatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothætæg|hohothætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüthatag|nüthatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüthætæg|nüthætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüthatag|nünüthatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüthætæg|nünüthætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïthatag|nïthatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïthætæg|nïthætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïthatag|nïnïthatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïthætæg|nïnïthætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthatag|luthatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luthætæg|luthætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthatag|luluthatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthætæg|luluthætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithatag|lithatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lithætæg|lithætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithatag|lilithatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithætæg|lilithætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothatag|kothatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kothætæg|kothætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothatag|kokothatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothætæg|kokothætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethatag|kethatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kethætæg|kethætæg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethatag|kekethatag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethætæg|kekethætæg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
